positive: A seamless, symmetrical geometric forest scene rendered in a bold, continuous line art style. The main subject is an intricate pattern of stylized trees, ferns, and exotic jungle flora, arranged in a central, repeating composition. The design must feature high contrast black ink on a white background, with clean, crisp silhouettes and a noticeable vintage tattoo flash aesthetic. Use only highly detailed, fine linework and geometric overlays to define the plant life. Composition must be perfect for apparel printing, ensuring no gradient fades or complex shading that compromises screen printing. Mid-century modern botanical illustration style, vector graphic quality, ultra-detailed, highly crisp, clean edges.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signatures, logo, trademark, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, smudge, gradient, photo, realistic, 3d, messy, cropped, incomplete, writing
